stages.name: 1. Reconnaissance
stages.description: Research the target — scan IPs, enumerate services, profile employees

stages.name: 2. Weaponization
stages.description: Build the payload — credential dictionaries, malware, exploit tooling

stages.name: 3. Delivery
stages.description: Transmit to victim — phishing, brute force, compromised website

stages.name: 4. Exploitation
stages.description: Trigger the vulnerability — valid credential found, exploit fires, shell opens

stages.name: 5. Installation
stages.description: Establish foothold — backdoors, authorized_keys, cron jobs, new users

stages.name: 6. Command & Control
stages.description: Open remote channel — reverse tunnels, beaconing, HTTPS covert traffic

stages.name: 7. Actions on Objectives
stages.description: Achieve the goal — exfiltration, ransomware, lateral movement, data destruction
